title: Tebnine hospital bears witness to ongoing war in southern Lebanon
subhead: Wounded people continue to pour into the emergency room of the only facility still operating near the 'yellow line.' After Washington and Tehran signed a memorandum of understanding, Donald Trump called on Israel to be 'more responsible' in Lebanon, where more than 3,800 people have been killed since March 2.

title: Trump and Iran's president sign deal to end the war

Appointed by Trump to lead the Fed, Kevin Warsh vows to reshape the institution
subhead: On Wednesday, June 17, the US central bank kept its key interest rates unchanged and mentioned a possible hike by the end of the year due to inflation driven by the conflict in the Middle East. Its new chair, who has been critical of indicators used by the institution, announced the creation of five task forces to reform the Fed.

title: 'Backrooms': 20-year-old prodigy Kane Parsons tries to reinvent horror cinema
subhead: Adapted from a YouTube series inspired by an urban legend about empty, unsettling spaces, the film ultimately falls back on familiar horror formulas.

title: MMA in Le Monde: From clandestine beginnings in France to the spotlight in front of the White House
subhead: Mixed martial arts has just experienced unprecedented media exposure thanks to US President Trump. In France, this combat sport, whose name first appeared in 2006 in the newspaper, had to fight to earn respect.

title: Trump welcomed at Versailles after G7: 'Macron has turned the château into a diplomatic extension of the Elysée'
subhead: In an interview, historian Fabien Oppermann said that the dinner planned for Wednesday highlights the French president's desire 'to impress his counterpart,' in hopes of preserving the transatlantic relationship at a time when ties with the US are especially strained.

subhead: One month after the Congolese authorities officially declared the outbreak, the health response is failing to contain the virus's spread, and the number of victims continues to rise.
byline: Morgane Le Cam and  Philémon Barbier

title: In China's Qinhuangdao, architect Moshe Safdie's futuristic complex reimagines urban living
subhead: The utopian 'Hai Bi Tai,' a 16-story residential complex with 1,800 units, most of which offer views of the sky, the city and the Bohai Sea, still has half its apartments standing empty due to a real estate crisis.

title: Weakened at home, Macron counts on 'his' last G7 to boost his diplomatic record
subhead: As his second term grows increasingly complex at home amid the killing of 11-year-old Lyhanna, the French president, who is chairing the G7 summit in Evian, is staking his legitimacy on an ambitious international agenda.
